properties.NOTES: LASD 0613 3:30pm: Wildfire N of Vincent. An EVACUATION ORDER has been issued for the area Sierra Hwy and the 14 Fwy south of Pearblossom. Gather family, pets, and LEAVE NOW. Your safety is in danger if you stay. Use caution while evacuating. Follow instructions from emergency personnel. If you need emergency assistance, dial 911. AlertLA.org.

LASD 0613 3:30pm: Wildfire N of Vincent. An EVACUATION WARNING has been issued for the area Sierra Hwy and the 14 Fwy south of Pearblossom. Prepare to leave if you live here or are nearby. Consider leaving now if you need more time to evacuate. Call 911 for emergency assistance. Visit AlertLA.org.
